description_long: This is a low-top athletic sneaker featuring a combination of gray, red, and orange hues. The upper is constructed from a mix of suede and synthetic materials, with visible stitching and layered paneling for added texture and durability. The shoe has a standard criss-cross lacing system with gray laces threaded through metal eyelets, and a padded tongue and collar for comfort. The midsole is primarily white with orange accents, while the outsole is red and appears to be made of rubber for traction. A pull tab is present at the heel, and the interior is lined with a soft, likely fabric material. The overall design is sporty and modern, suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A sporty, multi-colored sneaker with gray, red, and orange panels, featuring a criss-cross lacing system and a rubber sole. The shoe combines suede and synthetic materials for a modern, urban look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered gray and red panels, orange heel accent, and the full length of the white and orange midsole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, gray laces, and orange tongue detail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same color blocking and material layering, with a clear view of the heel pull tab.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the red heel panel, orange collar accent, and the pull tab at the back.
